hooks.command:
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && python3 -c "
import json, sys, os
pending = '.doc-patch-pending.json'
if os.path.exists(pending):
    with open(pending) as f:
        d = json.load(f)
    if d.get('status') == 'pending':
        print('⚠️  DOC DRIFT PENDING — .doc-patch-pending.json has status:pending. Self-screen or resolve before ending session.')
        sys.exit(1)
" 2>/dev/null || true
